label: Music transition
description: Declares when a MusicSequenceDef activates, at what priority, and under what danger conditions. The game evaluates all active transitions each music tick and plays the highest-priority sequence whose conditions are met.

workerType.label: Worker type
workerType.description: MusicTransition subclass that evaluates whether this transition should activate. Defaults to MusicTransition (the base implementation).

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Selection priority when multiple transitions are simultaneously eligible. Higher values win. Defaults to 100.

sequence.label: Sequence
sequence.description: The MusicSequenceDef to activate when this transition fires.

dangerRequirement.label: Danger requirement
dangerRequirement.description: Restricts when this transition can activate based on map danger state. None means no restriction; RequiresDanger activates only during danger; RequiresNoDanger activates only outside danger. Defaults to None.

overridesInterruptions.label: Overrides interruptions
overridesInterruptions.description: If true, this transition blocks other transitions from interrupting the currently playing sequence. Defaults to false.

new-music-transition.label: New music transition
new-music-transition.description: Minimal transition that activates a named sequence without a danger requirement.
